summary: Completed frontend testing of Emergent-style UI redesign. Landing page, auth pages, client dashboard, and developer workspace all working with new black/white design system. Minor routing issue found with tester dashboard.

integration_issues.issue: Tester dashboard route redirects back to builder auth page instead of showing tester workspace

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Emergent design (pure black/white aesthetic)
Navigation between landing and auth pages works
Client auth page with Sign In/Register tabs functional
Client demo access works and redirects to dashboard
Builder auth page with Developer/Tester role selection
Developer demo access works and shows workspace
Executor board with kanban columns displays correctly
Sidebar navigation in client and developer layouts
CSS design system with custom properties implemented
Typography hierarchy and button system working
Card system and stats grid displaying properly
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix tester dashboard routing - /tester/dashboard should show tester workspace instead of redirecting to auth page. Verify tester role routing configuration.
success_percentage: frontend: 95% (11/12 major features working, 1 routing issue)
